title: JWST absorption line spectroscopy with SPURS: ISM covering fractions and kinematics in individual galaxies at $z=5-9$
comment: Submitted to ApJ. 31 pages, 18 figures, 4 Tables (including appendix). Comments welcome
summary: We present deep rest-ultraviolet (UV) spectra of six luminous $z=5$ -- 9 galaxies in the Abell-2744 field taken as part of the JWST Cycle 4 Large Program SPURS. The individual galaxy spectra show unambiguous detections of interstellar medium (ISM) metal absorption lines from low- and high-ionization states of enriched gas, which we use to probe the ISM gas porosity and kinematics. We find a striking diversity in the absorption profiles. We find low-ionization gas covering fractions ranging from 0.2 to 0.9, indicating a heterogeneous and patchy neutral ISM. The low-ionization kinematics also show a large diversity, with velocity centroid values ranging from $+$70 to a significantly blueshifted $-140$ km$\,$s$^{-1}$, while the high-ion gas shows mostly blueshifted absorption, indicating the presence of multiphase outflows. While all sources show outflow signatures in blueshifted wings, we also find that half of our sample, in particular those with the lowest stellar masses and highest sSFRs, have low-ionization velocity centroids close to systemic velocities. This is in contrast to near-ubiquitous bulk low-ionization gas outflows at lower redshifts. We suggest that this diversity of kinematics may be due to the bulk of the cold gas having low outflow velocities in the lowest mass and highest sSFR systems, potentially due to inefficient entrainment and/or an unresolved infalling component. These spectra reveal a metal-enriched ISM with complex gas geometry and kinematics, and highlight the potential of deep JWST grating spectroscopy to reveal the properties of the ISM during the reionization era.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST深紫外光谱观测六个高红移星系(z=5-9)，发现星际介质的金属吸收线呈现多样性，揭示了不均匀的中性气体分布和复杂运动学，且低质量高恒星形成率星系中冷气体外流较弱。
AI.motivation: 探究再电离时代(z=5-9)星系的星际介质(ISM)性质，包括气体孔隙率、运动学和金属吸收特征，以了解早期星系中的气体分布与反馈机制。
AI.method: 利用JWST Cycle 4大型项目SPURS的深紫外光谱数据，分析Abell-2744天区六个明亮高红移星系的中性及电离态ISM金属吸收线，测量覆盖分数、速度质心等参数。
AI.result: 低电离气体覆盖分数范围0.2-0.9，呈斑块状分布；速度质心从+70到-140 km/s，高度多样化；高电离气体主要为蓝移吸收，表明多相外流存在；一半样本(特别是低质量、高sSFR星系)的低电离气体接近系统速度。
AI.conclusion: 早期星系的ISM具有复杂的气体几何和运动学特征，低质量高恒星形成率星系中冷气体外流较弱，可能是夹带效率不足或存在未分辨的流入成分，JWST深紫外光谱为再电离时代ISM研究提供了强大工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了JWST第四周期大型项目SPURS对Abell-2744场中六个明亮的红移z=5–9星系的深紫外（UV）光谱。单个星系光谱明确探测到来自富集气体的低电离和高电离态星际介质（ISM）金属吸收线，我们利用这些谱线研究ISM气体的孔隙率和运动学。我们发现吸收轮廓存在显著的多样性。低电离气体覆盖分数在0.2到0.9之间变化，表明中性ISM具有异质性和斑块性。低电离运动学也表现出很大的多样性，速度质心值从+70 km s^{-1}到显著蓝移的-140 km s^{-1}，而高电离气体主要显示蓝移吸收，表明存在多相外流。虽然所有源都在蓝移翼中显示出外流特征，但我们还发现一半样本，特别是那些具有最低恒星质量和最高恒星形成率（sSFR）的星系，其低电离速度质心接近系统速度。这与较低红移处近乎普遍存在的低电离气体整体外流形成对比。我们认为这种运动学多样性可能是由于在最低质量和最高sSFR系统中，大部分冷气体的外流速度较低，这可能是由于夹带效率不足和/或存在未分辨的流入成分。这些光谱揭示了具有复杂气体几何和运动学的富金属ISM，并突显了深JWGT光栅光谱学在揭示再电离时代ISM特性方面的潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：早期星系的ISM具有复杂的气体几何和运动学特征，低质量高恒星形成率星系中冷气体外流较弱，可能是夹带效率不足或存在未分辨的流入成分，JWST深紫外光谱为再电离时代ISM研究提供了强大工具。

title: JWST reveals how black holes are fed: kiloparsec-scale multiphase filaments feed sub-kiloparsec circumnuclear disks
comment: Submitted to ApJ Letters and revised in response to referee comments (14 pages, 4 figures)
summary: The Centaurus cluster is one of the most important archetypes of radio-mode AGN feedback, with its central galaxy, NGC 4696, launching powerful jets that inflate X-ray cavities and regulate cooling and star formation. NGC 4696 lies within a spectacular multiphase nebula of filaments extending over tens of kiloparsecs and spanning six decades in temperature, from hot (10^8 K) X-ray-emitting plasma to cold molecular gas. Owing to its proximity, Hubble Space Telescope H_alpha imaging reveals a striking S-shaped ionized-gas swirl within the black hole's sphere of influence - the first such structure identified in a cluster core. Here we present the first JWST observations of NGC 4696 with NIRSpec, probing the inner 618 pc * 618 pc at 10 pc resolution. These data reveal that the ionized swirl is a rotating, multiphase circumnuclear disk (CND) physically and kinematically connected to the larger-scale filamentary network. This provides the long-sought missing link between kiloparsec-scale cooling flows and black hole accretion on <100 pc scales. Strikingly, the observed morphology and kinematics are reproduced by tailored magnetohydrodynamic simulations, in which filamentary gas condenses from the hot atmosphere, loses angular momentum, and feeds a rotating CND that mediates accretion onto the black hole. A similar structure in NGC 1275, the Perseus cluster's central galaxy, together with our results on NGC 4696 - two prototypical radio-mode AGN feedback systems - points to a common mechanism: multiphase filaments transport gas from cluster scales down to the vicinity of the black hole via a CND, closing the AGN feedback loop and establishing a physically grounded framework for self-regulated galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRSpec对半人马座星系团中央星系NGC 4696进行观测，发现其中性气体漩涡是一个旋转的多相环核盘(CND)，连接了千秒差距尺度的冷却流与黑洞吸积，结合磁流体动力学模拟，揭示了多相纤维丝将气体从星系团尺度输送到黑洞附近的共同反馈机制。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，星系团核心中千秒差距尺度的冷却流如何与<100 pc尺度的黑洞吸积相连接一直缺乏直接观测证据，本研究旨在填补这一缺失环节。
AI.method: 利用JWST的NIRSpec仪器对NGC 4696进行高空间分辨率（10 pc）光谱成像观测，覆盖中心618 pc×618 pc区域，并结合定制的磁流体动力学(MHD)模拟进行对比。
AI.result: 发现中心S形电离气体漩涡是一个旋转的多相环核盘(CND)，它在物理和运动学上与更大尺度的纤维丝网络相连，且观测形态和运动学与MHD模拟结果高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 多相纤维丝将气体从星系团尺度输送到黑洞附近的环核盘，后者介导黑洞吸积，从而闭合了AGN反馈回路。NGC 4696与NGC 1275的相似性表明这是一种普遍的射电模式AGN反馈机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 半人马星系团是射电模式活动星系核反馈最重要的典型之一，其中心星系NGC 4696发射出强大的喷流，这些喷流膨胀形成X射线空腔并调节冷却和恒星形成。NGC 4696位于一个壮观的多相星云中，该星云由延伸数十千秒差距的纤维丝组成，跨越六个温度量级，从高温（10^8 K）X射线发射等离子体到冷分子气体。由于其邻近性，哈勃空间望远镜的H_α成像揭示了黑洞影响范围内一个引人注目的S形电离气体旋涡——这是在星系团核心中首次识别出的此类结构。本文展示了利用NIRSpec对NGC 4696进行的首次JWST观测，以10秒差距的分辨率探测了内部618 pc × 618 pc的区域。这些数据揭示，该电离旋涡是一个旋转的多相环核盘（CND），在物理和运动学上与更大尺度的纤维丝网络相连。这提供了长期缺失的环节，连接了千秒差距尺度的冷却流与小于100秒差距尺度上的黑洞吸积。引人注目的是，观测到的形态和运动学被定制的磁流体动力学模拟所重现，其中纤维丝气体从热大气中凝聚，失去角动量，并供给一个旋转的环核盘，该环核盘介导了向黑洞的吸积。NGC 1275（英仙座星系团的中心星系）中的类似结构，连同我们关于NGC 4696的结果——两个典型的射电模式活动星系核反馈系统——指向一个共同机制：多相纤维丝通过环核盘将气体从星系团尺度输送到黑洞附近，从而闭合活动星系核反馈回路，并为自调节的星系演化建立一个基于物理的框架。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：多相纤维丝将气体从星系团尺度输送到黑洞附近的环核盘，后者介导黑洞吸积，从而闭合了AGN反馈回路。NGC 4696与NGC 1275的相似性表明这是一种普遍的射电模式AGN反馈机制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top panel: Composite large-scale image of the Centaurus cluster. Chandra 0.5 to 7 keV image in blue. HST/WFC3 F665N (containing redshifted H \(\alpha\) ), with the continuum estimated from F814W and subtracted, shown in red. The field of view (FoV) of JWST/NIRspec is shown with the cyan square. Middle and bottom panels: The central \(760\) pc \(\times~550\) pc of NGC 4696. Top-left: HST/WFC3 F665N (containing redshifted H \(\alpha\) ), with the continuum estimated from F814W and subtracted, revealing the S-shaped ionized swirl. The approximate edge of the assumed CND is shown in a red circle. Top-right: same image in greyscale but with Pa \(\alpha\) flux map (NIRSpec) overlaid. Bottom-left/right: same with \(v_{50}\) (centroid velocity) and \(w_{80}\) (80% line width) maps, respectively, derived from the NIRSpec cube (Section II ). We see a CND connected to a filamentary structure to the west. The AGN position (Fabian et al. , 2016 ) is marked (green circle), with the arrow in \(v_{50}\) indicating the VLBA jet direction (Taylor et al. , 2006 ) ; velocities are relative to the systemic of NGC 4696.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上方面板：半人马星系团的复合大尺度图像。蓝色为钱德拉0.5至7 keV图像。红色为HST/WFC3 F665N（包含红移的H \(\alpha\)），其中连续谱由F814W估计并扣除。青色方框表示JWST/NIRspec的视场。中间和下方面板：NGC 4696的中心\(760\) pc \(\times~550\) pc区域。左上：HST/WFC3 F665N（包含红移的H \(\alpha\)），其中连续谱由F814W估计并扣除，揭示了S形电离旋涡。红色圆圈表示假定的CND的大致边界。右上：相同图像的灰度图，但叠加了Pa \(\alpha\) 流量图（NIRSpec）。左下/右：分别来自NIRSpec数据立方体（第二节）的\(v_{50}\)（质心速度）和\(w_{80}\)（80%线宽）图。我们看到一个CND连接到西侧的一个纤维丝结构。AGN位置（Fabian et al. , 2016 ）用绿色圆圈标记，\(v_{50}\)中的箭头指示VLBA喷流方向（Taylor et al. , 2006 ）；速度相对于NGC 4696的系统速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top panels: a) Snapshot of projected large-scale 3DMHD simulated filament network. b) Snapshot of 3DMHD simulated velocity field within a NIRSpec/IFU field of view, showing only cool gas with a surface density greater than \(1\%\) of the maximum. Both snapshots shown in panels a) and b) corresponds to \(t=40\) Myr of the 3DMHD simulations. Bottom panels: c) Evolution of the outer radius of the kpc-scale filaments (blue) and the cool ( \(\sim 10^{4-5}\) K) CND (orange) as a function of time. We define the CND size as the radius at which the spherically averaged angular momentum of the cool gas drops below 95% of the Keplerian value. The filaments rapidly expand to kpc scales and remain relatively stable, while the CND exhibits variability, with episodic growth and contraction on \(\sim\) 10-100 pc scales. The disc size of the CND in NGC 4696 (this work) and NGC 1275 (Oosterloo et al. , 2024 ) are also shown. d) Same as Panel c), but tracing the evolution of the orientation of the CND as traced by its angular momentum direction along three different projections.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上方面板：a) 投影的大尺度3DMHD模拟纤维丝网络的快照。b) NIRSpec/IFU视场内的3DMHD模拟速度场快照，仅显示表面密度大于最大值的\(1\%\)的冷气体。面板a)和b)中显示的两个快照对应于3DMHD模拟的\(t=40\) Myr。下方面板：c) kpc尺度纤维丝（蓝色）和冷（\(\sim 10^{4-5}\) K）CND（橙色）的外半径随时间的变化。我们将CND大小定义为冷气体的球平均角动量下降到开普勒值的95%以下的半径。纤维丝迅速膨胀到kpc尺度并保持相对稳定，而CND表现出变异性，在\(\sim\) 10-100 pc尺度上具有间歇性增长和收缩。还显示了NGC 4696（本文）和NGC 1275（Oosterloo et al. , 2024 ）中CND的盘大小。d) 与面板c)相同，但追踪了CND取向的演化，由其角动量方向沿三个不同投影表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Position-velocity (PV) diagrams. (a) \(v_{50}\) map with slit positions and extraction directions (green circle marks AGN position from Fabian et al. , 2016 ) . (b) PV diagram along the blue slit (CND), showing velocities rapidly declining to systemic on both sides. (c) PV diagram along the green slit, highlighting the filament’s kinematic connection to the CND. Velocities are relative to systemic (dashed horizontal line); contours start at \(3\sigma\) and increase by \(1\sigma\) . The scale bar shows the NIRSpec/IFU spatial resolution. (d,e) Example Pa \(\alpha\) spectra from the receding (red) and approaching (blue) sides, extracted from the regions and positions marked in (a,b). The continuum is shown with the grey curves. (f) Snapshot of 3DMHD simulated velocity field within a NIRSpec/IFU field of view, same as in Fig. 2 with slit position shown with the green rectangle. (g) PV diagram along the green slit, highlighting the filament’s kinematic connection to the 3DMHD CND.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：位置-速度（PV）图。(a) \(v_{50}\) 图，显示狭缝位置和提取方向（绿色圆圈标记来自Fabian et al. , 2016 的AGN位置）。(b) 沿蓝色狭缝（CND）的PV图，显示速度在两侧迅速下降到系统速度。(c) 沿绿色狭缝的PV图，突出显示了纤维丝与CND的运动学连接。速度相对于系统速度（水平虚线）；等高线从\(3\sigma\)开始，以\(1\sigma\)递增。比例尺显示NIRSpec/IFU的空间分辨率。(d,e) 来自后退（红色）和接近（蓝色）侧的示例Pa \(\alpha\) 光谱，从(a,b)中标记的区域和位置提取。灰色曲线显示连续谱。(f) NIRSpec/IFU视场内的3DMHD模拟速度场快照，与图2相同，绿色矩形显示狭缝位置。(g) 沿绿色狭缝的PV图，突出显示了纤维丝与3DMHD CND的运动学连接。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Eight snapshots of the 3DMHD simulated velocity field within a JWST/NIRSpec IFU field of view, analogous to panel b) of Fig. 2 , and approximately evenly spaced in time. All panels are centered on the black hole position with the same surface density threshold in panel b) of Fig. 2 . The size and orientation of the CND vary with time, but the CND remains present and is typically connected to a larger-scale feeding filament.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：JWST/NIRSpec IFU视场内3DMHD模拟速度场的八个快照，类似于图2的面板b)，且大致等间隔时间。所有面板均以黑洞位置为中心，具有与图2面板b)中相同的表面密度阈值。CND的大小和取向随时间变化，但CND始终存在，并且通常连接到一个更大尺度的供给纤维丝。

title: A Population of Red Galaxies with Very Strong Emission Lines at $z > 5$ Revealed by the NIRCam Medium Bands: ''Classic'' LRDs, Dusty Star-Forming Galaxies, and a Missing Population of LRDs
comment: 26 pages, 12 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ApJ
summary: The NIRCam medium-bands have proven to be efficient at identifying Emission Line Galaxies (ELGs) with high equivalent width (EW) H$α$ and [OIII]+H$β$ emission lines. In this paper we exploit this efficiency to identify a sample of ELGs at $4.9 \lesssim z \lesssim 8.9$ using medium-band imaging from the CANUCS, Technicolor, and JUMPS surveys. We find that the ELGs exhibit a strong correlation between continuum color and emission line strength, such that galaxies with bluer UV/optical continua have stronger H$α$ and [OIII]+H$β$ emission lines. We identify 26 galaxies that are outliers from this relation, which we call the Red Emission line Galaxies (REGs), because of their red continuum color and strong emission lines. We classify the REGs into three categories: 1) ''classic'' Little Red Dots (LRDs) selected with common literature criteria, 2) extended REGs, resolved in F444W and consistent with being Dusty Star Forming Galaxies (DSFGs), and 3) compact REGs, unresolved in F444W but not classified as LRDs. The compact REGs fail common LRD selections for several reasons, including faint continuua, contamination from emission lines (very strong [OIII]+H$β$), and UV/optical colors that are flatter than those of LRDs. We conclude that the compact REGs are likely LRDs that ''classic'' selection criteria miss, and are therefore missing from existing samples. Our results suggest that medium-band selection can provide more complete samples of these objects.

artifacts.abstract_zh: NIRCam中波段已被证明能高效识别具有高等值宽度(EW) Hα和[OIII]+Hβ发射线的发射线星系(ELGs)。本文利用这一效率，通过CANUCS、Technicolor和JUMPS巡天的中波段成像，识别了一个红移范围在4.9 ≲ z ≲ 8.9的ELGs样本。我们发现，ELGs的连续谱颜色与发射线强度之间存在强相关性，即紫外/光学连续谱更蓝的星系具有更强的Hα和[OIII]+Hβ发射线。我们识别出26个偏离该相关性的星系，称之为红色发射线星系(REGs)，因为它们具有红色的连续谱颜色和强的发射线。我们将REGs分为三类：1) 根据常见文献标准选出的“经典”小红点(LRDs)；2) 在F444W波段中可分辨的、与尘埃恒星形成星系(DSFGs)一致的延展REGs；以及3) 在F444W波段中不可分辨但未被归类为LRDs的致密REGs。致密REGs因多种原因未能通过常见的LRD选择标准，包括连续谱微弱、发射线（非常强的[OIII]+Hβ）污染，以及紫外/光学颜色比LRDs更平坦。我们得出结论，致密REGs很可能是被“经典”选择标准遗漏的LRDs，因此现有样本中缺失了它们。我们的结果表明，中波段选择方法可以提供这些天体更完整的样本。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，致密REGs很可能是被经典LRD选择标准遗漏的对象，中波段选择方法可以提供更完整的样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Color-color diagrams for galaxies with the H \(\alpha\) or [OIII] + H \(\beta\) emission lines in one of the \(F410M\) (top left), \(F430M\) (top right), \(F460M\) (bottom left), and \(F480M\) (bottom right) bands, with the sample filtered to galaxies at the correct redshift (see also Table 1 ). In each panel, the \(y-\) axis color highlights the rest-frame UV-optical continuum, using \(F150W\) to measure the rest-frame UV, and either \(F360M\) or \(F410M\) to measure the rest-frame optical (see Table 1 ). The \(x\) -axis color then highlights the strength of the H \(\alpha\) or [OIII] + H \(\beta\) emission lines, using either \(F360M\) or \(F410M\) to measure the rest-frame optical continuum, and the band containing an emission line. Bluer \(x-\) axis colors indicate stronger emission lines while redder colors indicate weaker lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在F410M（左上）、F430M（右上）、F460M（左下）和F480M（右下）波段之一中具有H \(\alpha\) 或[OIII] + H \(\beta\) 发射线的星系的双色图，样本已过滤至正确红移的星系（另见表1）。在每个面板中，\(y-\) 轴颜色突出显示静止系紫外-光学连续谱，使用F150W测量静止系紫外，并使用F360M或F410M测量静止系光学（见表1）。\(x\) 轴颜色则突出显示H \(\alpha\) 或[OIII] + H \(\beta\) 发射线的强度，使用F360M或F410M测量静止系光学连续谱，以及包含发射线的波段。更蓝的\(x-\) 轴颜色表示更强的发射线，而更红的颜色表示更弱的线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: All four panels in Figure 1 combined onto one panel. There is a correlation between emission line strength and continuum color, where bluer galaxies have stronger emission lines (bottom right), and redder galaxies have weaker emission lines (top left). We fit both samples with a straight line which allows us to calculate an expected continuum color based on a given emission line color. We then define the REGs (pink stars) as galaxies with continuum colors \(\geq 2\sigma\) redder than this fit. Fitting for the line- and photo- \(z\) -selected samples were performed separately, and we show the best fit (solid black line) and \(2\sigma\) selection criteria (dashed line) for the line-selected sample only. The best fit and selection for the photo- \(z\) -selected sample is similar to the line-selected. The side panels show four examples of different kinds of SEDs found in this diagram, including a blue galaxy with very strong emission lines (bottom right), an average ELG with a flat continuum and strong emission lines (bottom left), galaxy with red continuum fluxes and weak emission lines (top left), and a REG (top right). The EWs reported for each example are measured directly from the medium-band photometry, as described in § III.4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：图1中的所有四个面板合并到一个面板中。发射线强度与连续谱颜色之间存在相关性，其中更蓝的星系具有更强的发射线（右下），而更红的星系具有更弱的发射线（左上）。我们用一条直线拟合两个样本，从而可以根据给定的发射线颜色计算预期的连续谱颜色。然后，我们将连续谱颜色比该拟合红\(\geq 2\sigma\) 的星系定义为REGs（粉色星形）。对线选和光选样本的拟合是分别进行的，我们仅显示线选样本的最佳拟合（实黑线）和\(2\sigma\) 选择标准（虚线）。光选样本的最佳拟合和选择标准与线选样本相似。侧面板显示了该图中发现的四种不同SED示例，包括具有非常强发射线的蓝星系（右下）、具有平坦连续谱和强发射线的平均ELG（左下）、具有红色连续谱通量和弱发射线的星系（左上）以及一个REG（右上）。每个示例报告的EW是直接从介质波段测光中测量的，如§ III.4所述。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: EW(H \(\alpha\) ) (left) and EW([OIII] + H \(\beta\) ) (right) vs. photometric redshift for our samples. REGs which ony heave measurements of the [OIII] + H \(\beta\) emission lines are outlined with a grey outline. The sample of REGs have a wide range of EWs, and include both some of the lowest and highest EW objects in the line- and photo- \(z\) -selected samples.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：EW(H \(\alpha\) )（左）和EW([OIII] + H \(\beta\) )（右）与样本的光度红移的关系。仅具有[OIII] + H \(\beta\) 发射线测量的REGs用灰色轮廓标出。REGs样本具有广泛的EW范围，并且包括线选和光选样本中一些最低和最高EW的天体。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: \(F150W-F444W\) vs. \(F444W\) magnitude diagram for our samples. We also show the \(F150W-F444W\) ERO color cuts from Williams et al. 2024 (solid line), Gottumukkala et al. 2024 (dahsed line), and Barrufet et al. 2025b (dash-dot line). Roughly half the REGs qualify as EROs based on at least one of these criteria, and the REG LRDs have similar colors and magnitudes to the full sample of LRDs in CANUCS.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：样本的\(F150W-F444W\) 与\(F444W\) 星等图。我们还显示了来自Williams等人2024（实线）、Gottumukkala等人2024（虚线）和Barrufet等人2025b（点划线）的\(F150W-F444W\) ERO颜色切割。大约一半的REGs基于这些标准中的至少一个符合ERO条件，并且REG LRDs的颜色和星等与CANUCS中LRDs的完整样本相似。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of which filters are used to create the color-color diagrams in Figures 1 and 2 , including the redshifts targeted.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于创建图1和图2中双色图的滤光片摘要，包括目标红移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: \(A_{V}\) (left), EW(H \(\alpha\) ) (middle) and EW([OIII] + H \(\beta\) ) (right) vs. \(R_{\text{eff}}\) measured using GALFIT in \(F444W\) of the REGs and LRDs in CANUCS (defined in § III.3 ). \(R_{\text{eff}}\) is reported in arcseconds, with the vertical dashed line showing the FWHM of the \(F444W\) PSF. Nine of the REGs are resolved in \(F444W\) with effective radii larger than the \(F444W\) PSF, while remaining REGs are unresolved and have \(R_{\text{eff}}\) consistent with zero within uncertainties. Eight of these unresolved REGs qualify as LRDs based on the selection criteria Kokorev et al. 2024 and Kocevski et al. 2025 (see III.3 ), which we refer to as the REG LRDs. We refer to the remaining nine unresolved REGs as the compact REGs. Objects with black outlines are experiencing lensing magnification, with \(\mu\sim 1-2\) . We report the lensing corrected \(R_{\text{eff}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：CANUCS中REGs和LRDs（定义见§ III.3）的\(A_{V}\) （左）、EW(H \(\alpha\) )（中）和EW([OIII] + H \(\beta\) )（右）与使用GALFIT在\(F444W\) 中测量的\(R_{\text{eff}}\) 的关系。\(R_{\text{eff}}\) 以角秒报告，垂直虚线显示\(F444W\) PSF的FWHM。九个REGs在\(F444W\) 中可分辨，有效半径大于\(F444W\) PSF，而其余REGs不可分辨，其\(R_{\text{eff}}\) 在不确定度内与零一致。其中八个不可分辨的REGs基于Kokorev等人2024和Kocevski等人2025的选择标准（见III.3）符合LRD条件，我们称之为REG LRDs。我们将剩余的九个不可分辨REGs称为致密REGs。带有黑色轮廓的天体正在经历透镜放大，\(\mu\sim 1-2\) 。我们报告了透镜校正后的\(R_{\text{eff}}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Three examples of very Red Emission line Galaxies with the EAZY-py SED fits, photometry, and cutouts. This includes examples of all three types of REGs (§ V ): compact, LRD, and extended REGs are shown in the top, middle and bottom panels, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：三个非常红的发射线星系的示例，包括EAZY-py SED拟合、测光和剪裁图。这包括所有三种类型REGs（§ V）的示例：致密、LRD和延展REGs分别显示在顶部、中间和底部面板中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Six cutouts for each type of REG, including REG LRDs (top row) extended REGs (middle row) and compact REGs (bottom row). The cutouts are created using the same filters used to create the color-color diagrams in Figures 1 and 2 , \(F150W\) (blue), the continuum band (green), and the band containing either the H \(\alpha\) or [OIII] + H \(\beta\) emission lines (red, summarized in Table 1 ). We report the photometric redshifts of each object, along with the \(R_{\text{eff}}\) (in kpc) in \(F444W\) from GALFIT for the extended REGs. For the REG LRDs and compact REGs, we report the upper limit on \(R_{\text{eff}}\) (in pc) measured from the FWHM of the \(F444W\) PSF, \(0.161^{\prime\prime}\) . Objects marked with an asterisk are experiencing lensing magnification, with \(\mu\sim 1-2\) . We correct the upper limits on \(R_{\text{eff}}\) for the lensing when applicable.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：每种类型REGs的六个剪裁图，包括REG LRDs（顶行）、延展REGs（中间行）和致密REGs（底行）。剪裁图使用与图1和图2中创建双色图相同的滤光片创建：F150W（蓝色）、连续谱波段（绿色）以及包含H \(\alpha\) 或[OIII] + H \(\beta\) 发射线的波段（红色，总结于表1）。我们报告每个天体的光度红移，以及延展REGs在\(F444W\) 中来自GALFIT的\(R_{\text{eff}}\) （以kpc为单位）。对于REG LRDs和致密REGs，我们报告从\(F444W\) PSF的FWHM（\(0.161^{\prime\prime}\) ）测量的\(R_{\text{eff}}\) 上限（以pc为单位）。标有星号的天体正在经历透镜放大，\(\mu\sim 1-2\) 。我们在适用时校正了\(R_{\text{eff}}\) 上限的透镜效应。

title: Star formation at z$\sim$0.9 from the OTELO survey: A comprehensive view combining deep optical spectroscopy and infrared data
summary:
We aim to quantify the star formation rate (SFR) from deep optical spectroscopic data and far-infrared (FIR) photometry from a sample of galaxies at $z\sim 0.9$ from the OTELO survey and compare the activity estimated by optical tracers and FIR emission.
  We used the multi-wavelength OTELO catalogue to construct a sample of FIR sources. We identified and separated galaxies with active nuclei and derived the physical properties of the rest. We analysed their spectral energy distribution, obtaining estimates for stellar mass, dust attenuation, luminosity, and SFR based on infrared luminosity. We also studied H$β$ and [OIII] emission-line galaxies without significant FIR emission from previous works. This approach allowed us to perform a comparative analysis among the SFR obtained through different calibrators, in particular H$β$, presented in a previous work.
  We find that FIR-based SFR estimates uncover a significant fraction of hidden star formation. We determined that the SFR density obtained from the FIR emission is three times larger than that obtained from only emission-line sources. Likely related to the fact that each SFR tracer provides insight into star formation over different timescales, we suggest that such indicators are also more or less suited for different galaxy populations. Specifically, while optical emission lines effectively trace star formation in lower-mass galaxies, FIR-derived SFRs provide a more reliable measure in massive dust-rich systems. By accounting for both optically visible and obscured star formation, we provide a more comprehensive view of the star-forming main sequence at $z \sim 0.9$ and reinforce the importance of infrared tracers in studying galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用OTELO巡天数据，通过光学光谱和远红外测光量化了z~0.9星系样本的恒星形成率，发现远红外示踪剂揭示的恒星形成率密度是仅使用发射线源的三倍，表明红外示踪剂在探测尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成中至关重要。
AI.motivation: 为了量化z~0.9星系中由光学光谱数据和远红外测光揭示的恒星形成率，并比较光学示踪剂与远红外发射所估计的恒星形成活动差异。
AI.method: 利用OTELO多波段星表构建远红外源样本，识别并分离活动星系核；分析其余星系的光谱能量分布，获取恒星质量、尘埃消光、光度及基于红外光度的恒星形成率；同时研究无显著远红外发射的Hβ和[OIII]发射线星系，对多种校准器（尤其是Hβ）得到的恒星形成率进行比较分析。
AI.result: 远红外示踪剂揭示了大量隐藏的恒星形成，其得到的恒星形成率密度是仅使用发射线源的三倍。光学发射线在低质量星系中有效示踪恒星形成，而远红外示踪剂在富含尘埃的大质量星系中提供更可靠的测量。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时考虑光学可见和被遮蔽的恒星形成，本研究提供了z~0.9恒星形成主序的更全面视图，强调了红外示踪剂在星系演化研究中的重要性。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为z~0.9星系的恒星形成率测量，与用户Zotero画像中的'star formation rate'、'dust'等关键词有部分匹配，但用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和多相气体，而本文不涉及引力透镜，红移较低(z~0.9)，且主要关注恒星形成率校准而非动力学或气体性质。因此相关性一般。

recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配，使用光学光谱和远红外测光，未使用引力透镜方法。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们旨在利用OTELO巡天的深度光学光谱数据和远红外（FIR）测光数据，量化红移$z\sim 0.9$处星系样本的恒星形成率（SFR），并比较光学示踪剂和FIR发射所估计的活动。我们使用多波段OTELO星表构建了一个FIR源样本。我们识别并分离了具有活跃核的星系，并推导了其余星系的物理性质。我们分析了它们的光谱能量分布，获得了基于红外光度的恒星质量、尘埃消光、光度和SFR的估计值。我们还研究了先前工作中没有显著FIR发射的H$β$和[OIII]发射线星系。这种方法使我们能够对不同校准器（特别是先前工作中提出的H$β$）获得的SFR进行比较分析。我们发现，基于FIR的SFR估计揭示了大量隐藏的恒星形成。我们确定，从FIR发射获得的SFR密度是从仅发射线源获得的三倍。这可能与每个SFR示踪剂在不同时间尺度上洞察恒星形成有关，我们建议这些指标也或多或少适用于不同的星系种群。具体而言，虽然光学发射线有效地示踪了低质量星系中的恒星形成，但FIR衍生的SFR在富含尘埃的大质量系统中提供了更可靠的测量。通过同时考虑光学可见和被遮蔽的恒星形成，我们提供了$z \sim 0.9$处恒星形成主序的更全面视图，并强调了红外示踪剂在星系演化研究中的重要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：通过同时考虑光学可见和被遮蔽的恒星形成，本研究提供了z~0.9恒星形成主序的更全面视图，强调了红外示踪剂在星系演化研究中的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Example DEEP2 spectrum of source 9550, whose emission lines are not detected in the OTELO pseudo-spectrum. The [O ii ] line (red arrow) is detected in the DEEP2 spectrum with a very low S/N, indicating intrinsically weak nebular emission. At this redshift, H \(\beta\) and both [O iii ] emission lines fall within the OTELO wavelength range (8950–9300 Å), but their expected fluxes remain below the OTELO detection threshold and may lie close to the edges of the wavelength coverage. Therefore, this source is not classified as an emission-line object in the OTELO survey.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：源9550的示例DEEP2光谱，其发射线在OTELO伪光谱中未被检测到。在DEEP2光谱中检测到[O ii]线（红色箭头），信噪比非常低，表明内禀星云发射较弱。在此红移处，H \(\beta\)和两条[O iii]发射线均落在OTELO波长范围（8950–9300 Å）内，但它们的预期通量仍低于OTELO检测阈值，并且可能接近波长覆盖范围的边缘。因此，该源在OTELO巡天中未被分类为发射线天体。

title: Polarized and unpolarized synchrotron emission from dark matter in extragalactic targets
summary: We compute 95% confidence-level upper limits on the dark matter annihilation cross section and decay rate from both total-intensity and polarized synchrotron emission in five extragalactic targets: M31, the Large Magellanic Cloud (LMC), the Draco and Sculptor dwarf spheroidal galaxies, and the Coma cluster. Using Planck maps at 30, 44, and 70 GHz, we solve the diffusion-loss equation for dark-matter-produced electrons and positrons numerically with DRAGON and integrate the resulting synchrotron emission along the line of sight with HERMES, computing both total-intensity and polarized-intensity maps for each target with target-specific magnetic-field, gas, and radiation-field environments. The 30 GHz channel yields the most stringent constraints in all cases, and limits on annihilation or decay into $e^+e^-$ are stronger than those for $b\bar{b}$ due to the harder injected spectrum. For most targets the total-intensity and polarized limits are broadly comparable; the LMC is an exception, where Faraday depolarization in the turbulent disk suppresses the polarized signal relative to total intensity, making total intensity the primary estimator. Our results are robust against the choice of flux estimator and coordinate uncertainty. This work demonstrates that microwave polarimetry provides a complementary and largely independent probe of dark matter synchrotron emission in extragalactic targets.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Planck卫星30、44、70 GHz频段数据，对五个河外目标（M31、大麦哲伦云、天龙座和玉夫座矮椭球星系、后发座星系团）的暗物质湮灭截面和衰变率给出了95%置信水平的上限。通过DRAGON和HERMES数值模拟，对比了总强度和偏振同步辐射两种探针，发现30 GHz通道约束最强，e⁺e⁻通道比b\bar{b}通道更严格，且大多数目标两者效果相当，但大麦哲伦云中法拉第退偏振使总强度更优。
AI.motivation: 探索利用微波偏振测量作为独立互补的探针，从河外目标的同步辐射中约束暗物质性质，弥补传统总强度方法可能存在的系统误差和模型依赖。
AI.method: 对五个河外目标，使用DRAGON数值求解暗物质产生电子/正电子的扩散-损失方程，再用HERMES沿视线积分计算总强度和偏振同步辐射图，结合Planck 30/44/70 GHz数据，针对每个目标建立特定的磁场、气体和辐射场环境。
AI.result: 30 GHz通道给出最强约束；e⁺e⁻湮灭/衰变通道上限比b\bar{b}更严格；大多数目标总强度和偏振极限相当；大麦哲伦云中法拉第退偏振使偏振信号弱于总强度；结果对通量估计方法和坐标不确定性稳健。
AI.conclusion: 微波偏振测量可作为河外目标暗物质同步辐射的有效独立探针，与总强度方法互补，有助于提高暗物质搜寻的可靠性和灵敏度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们计算了五个河外目标（M31、大麦哲伦云（LMC）、天龙座和玉夫座矮球状星系以及后发星系团）中，来自总强度和偏振同步辐射的暗物质湮灭截面和衰变率的95%置信水平上限。利用普朗克卫星在30、44和70 GHz的巡天数据，我们通过DRAGON数值求解暗物质产生的电子和正电子的扩散-损失方程，并利用HERMES沿视线积分得到的同步辐射，为每个目标生成了具有目标特定磁场、气体和辐射场环境的总强度和偏振强度图。在所有情况下，30 GHz通道给出了最严格的约束，且由于注入谱更硬，湮灭或衰变为$e^+e^-$的限制强于$b\bar{b}$。对于大多数目标，总强度和偏振限制大致相当；大麦哲伦云是一个例外，其中湍流盘中的法拉第退偏振抑制了偏振信号相对于总强度的强度，使得总强度成为主要估计量。我们的结果对通量估计量的选择和坐标不确定性具有稳健性。这项工作表明，微波偏振测量为河外目标暗物质同步辐射提供了一种互补且基本独立的探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，微波偏振测量可作为河外目标暗物质同步辐射的有效独立探针，与总强度方法互补，有助于提高暗物质搜寻的可靠性和灵敏度。

title: Simple cyanides and formylium ions isotopologues in early star-forming molecular cores
summary: Understanding the chemistry related to the early stages of star formation is of great importance, as it is linked to the beginnings of the most complex chemistry in the interstellar medium. In this context, we investigate the chemical behaviour of simple cyano-bearing molecules and formylium ions isotopologues in a sample of massive infrared-quiet molecular cores. Using archive ALMA Band 7 data of 37 early molecular cores embedded in ATLASGAL clumps, we obtain abundances of HC$_{3}$N, H$^{13}$CN, HN$^{13}$C, H$^{13}$CO$^+$, and HC$^{17}$O$^+$. We used various statistical methods, including hierarchical clustering, to analyse the correlations between molecular abundances, ratios and temperature. We find that HN$^{13}$C, H$^{13}$CO$^{+}$, and HC$^{17}$O$^{+}$ abundances correlate positively with kinetic temperature, suggesting temperature-driven chemical regulation in young massive cores. A similar trend is observed for H$^{13}$CN, although the limited number of detections prevents a definitive conclusion. HC$_3$N abundances show no dependence on temperature within the 40-100 K range, suggesting a chemical steady state between gas-phase production and grain-surface depletion. Similarly, the H$^{13}$CN/HN$^{13}$C ratio, measured in only six regions, suggests no correlation with temperature, differing from findings at lower temperatures. Using a hierarchical clustering method based on abundance ratios, novel in astrochemistry, we identified chemically distinct core groups that align with thermal conditions. Additionally, we provide HC$^{17}$O$^+$ detections for 28 cores-a significant expansion of existing literature-and find evidence that H$^{13}$CO$^{+}$ transitions may have higher optical depths than commonly assumed. These results are important because characterizing the chemical state of early star-forming stages is essential for understanding the onset of the most complex chemistry.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用ALMA数据分析了37个大质量红外暗分子核中氰基分子和甲酰离子同位素体的化学行为，发现HN¹³C、H¹³CO⁺、HC¹⁷O⁺丰度与温度正相关，HC₃N丰度在40-100K范围内与温度无关，并首次将层次聚类方法应用于天体化学中的丰度比分析，识别出与热条件一致的化学核群，同时提供了28个核的HC¹⁷O⁺探测结果。
AI.motivation: 理解恒星形成早期阶段的化学过程对于研究星际介质中最复杂化学的开端至关重要，但目前对大质量红外暗核中简单氰基分子和甲酰离子同位素体的化学行为尚缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 利用ALMA Band 7档案数据对嵌入ATLASGAL团块中的37个早期分子核进行观测，获得HC₃N、H¹³CN、HN¹³C、H¹³CO⁺和HC¹⁷O⁺的丰度；采用多种统计方法（包括层次聚类）分析分子丰度、比值与温度之间的相关性。
AI.result: HN¹³C、H¹³CO⁺和HC¹⁷O⁺丰度与动力学温度正相关；HC₃N丰度在40-100K范围内与温度无关；首次将层次聚类基于丰度比应用于天体化学，识别出与热条件一致的化学核群；在28个核中探测到HC¹⁷O⁺，显著扩展了现有文献。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 理解与恒星形成早期阶段相关的化学过程具有重要意义，因为它与星际介质中最复杂化学过程的起源密切相关。在此背景下，我们研究了一个大质量红外宁静分子核样本中简单含氰分子和甲酰离子同位素体的化学行为。利用ALMA 7波段对嵌入ATLASGAL团块中的37个早期分子核的存档数据，我们获得了HC$_{3}$N、H$^{13}$CN、HN$^{13}$C、H$^{13}$CO$^+$和HC$^{17}$O$^+$的丰度。我们使用了包括层次聚类在内的多种统计方法来分析分子丰度、比值和温度之间的相关性。我们发现HN$^{13}$C、H$^{13}$CO$^{+}$和HC$^{17}$O$^{+}$的丰度与动力学温度呈正相关，表明在年轻大质量核中存在温度驱动的化学调控。H$^{13}$CN也观察到类似的趋势，但有限的探测次数阻止了最终结论。HC$_3$N的丰度在40-100 K范围内与温度无关，表明气相生成和颗粒表面消耗之间达到了化学稳态。类似地，仅在六个区域测量到的H$^{13}$CN/HN$^{13}$C比值表明与温度无相关性，这与较低温度下的发现不同。通过使用基于丰度比值的层次聚类方法（这在天体化学中是新颖的），我们识别出了与热条件相关的化学上不同的核群。此外，我们提供了28个核的HC$^{17}$O$^+$探测结果——这是对现有文献的显著扩展——并发现H$^{13}$CO$^{+}$跃迁的光深可能高于通常假设的值。这些结果很重要，因为表征恒星形成早期阶段的化学状态对于理解最复杂化学过程的起始至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：温度驱动了年轻大质量核中的化学调控，HC₃N在40-100K达到气相生成与颗粒表面消耗的化学稳态，H¹³CO⁺跃迁的光深可能高于普遍假设，这些结果对理解恒星形成早期阶段的化学状态具有重要意义。

title: The quasi-star model for Little Red Dots: potential and challenges
comment: Submitted to A&A. The catalogue with the best-fit parameters will be available upon acceptance. 12 pages (+ 4 in the appendix), 7 (+3) figures, 2 (+1) tables. Comments welcome
summary: (Abridged) Little Red Dots (LRDs) are a class of sources discovered by JWST observationally defined by a "V-shaped" rest-frame UV-Optical SED, a compact or unresolved morphology, and for having, frequently, broad hydrogen emission lines. Among various models, those involving a quasi-star interpret LRDs as an intermediate stage in the evolution of a super-massive black hole (SMBH) seed into a classic AGN. In this paper, we employ the radiative-transfer code \texttt{Cloudy} to study whether this model is able to reproduce the spectral features commonly observed in LRDs. The model consists of an accreting SMBH ($M_{\rm BH}\sim10^{5-6} \ M_\odot$) surrounded by a convective layer where a black-body (BB) spectrum with $T\sim5000 \ {\rm K}$ and $L\sim10^{44.4} \ {\rm erg \ s}^{-1}$ is produced. This BB is then reprocessed by a concentric thick ($ΔR\sim1000 \ {\rm AU}$) shell of dense ($n_{\rm H}\sim10^{11} \ {\rm cm}^{-3}$) gas partially ionised by thermal collisions. The emerging radiation is further reprocessed by a diffuse clumpy medium surrounding the quasi-star. We fit this model to JWST/NIRSpec spectra of LRDs from the literature, deriving the main physical parameters and the SMBH masses. Once coupled with the UV emission from a host galaxy, this model is able to reproduce the shape of the UV-to-NIR continuum, including the presence of a Balmer break, as well as the luminosity of the hydrogen emission lines. However, this quasi-star model does not natively account for the presence of broad helium lines and for the possible presence of hot dust, needing additional components to match these observables. Our main result is to show how some LRDs can be modeled as quasi-stars, highlighting that a significant degeneracy exists among different LRD models. This has important consequences for our understanding of the mechanisms driving black hole growth in the early Universe.

AI.tldr: 本文研究“准恒星”模型能否解释韦伯望远镜发现的“小红点”（LRDs）。使用Cloudy辐射传输代码建模发现，准恒星模型能重现LRD的UV-NIR连续谱和氢发射线，但无法解释氦线和热尘埃，说明不同LRD模型之间存在简并性。
AI.motivation: 小红点（LRDs）是JWST发现的一类具有独特光谱特征的天体，它们可能是早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞种子向经典活动星系核演化过程的中间阶段。验证准恒星模型能否解释LRD的观测特征，对于理解早期宇宙黑洞增长机制至关重要。
AI.method: 使用辐射传输代码Cloudy进行建模。模型包含：一个吸积的SMBH（~10^5-6 M⊙），周围被对流层包裹产生黑体谱（T~5000 K, L~10^44.4 erg/s）；该黑体辐射被致密气体壳层（ΔR~1000 AU, nH~10^11 cm^-3）再处理；再经过准恒星周围的弥散团块介质进一步处理。将模型拟合到JWST/NIRSpec观测的LRD光谱。
AI.result: 准恒星模型可重现LRD的UV-NIR连续谱形状、巴尔默跳变特征及氢发射线光度。但模型无法天然解释宽氦发射线和热尘埃的存在，需要额外组件。这表明不同LRD模型之间存在显著简并性。
AI.conclusion: 部分LRD可以被建模为准恒星，但不同模型间存在简并性，这对理解早期宇宙黑洞增长机制有重要影响。

artifacts.abstract_zh: （摘要略）小红点（LRDs）是詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜发现的一类源，其观测特征包括：静止系紫外-光学能谱分布呈“V”形、形态致密或未分辨，且常具有宽的氢发射线。在各种模型中，涉及准恒星的模型将LRDs解释为超大质量黑洞（SMBH）种子演化为经典活动星系核的中间阶段。本文采用辐射转移代码\texttt{Cloudy}研究该模型能否再现LRDs中常见的谱特征。该模型由一个吸积的SMBH（$M_{\rm BH}\sim10^{5-6} \ M_\odot$）组成，周围环绕着一个对流层，其中产生温度为$T\sim5000 \ {\rm K}$、光度为$L\sim10^{44.4} \ {\rm erg \ s}^{-1}$的黑体谱。该黑体谱随后被一个同心且厚（$ΔR\sim1000 \ {\rm AU}$）的致密（$n_{\rm H}\sim10^{11} \ {\rm cm}^{-3}$）气体壳层再处理，该气体壳层因热碰撞而部分电离。出射辐射进一步被准恒星周围的弥散团块介质再处理。我们将该模型拟合至文献中LRDs的JWST/NIRSpec光谱，推导出主要物理参数和SMBH质量。一旦与宿主星系的紫外辐射耦合，该模型能够再现紫外到近红外连续谱的形状（包括巴尔默跳变的存在）以及氢发射线的光度。然而，该准恒星模型本身无法解释宽氦线的存在以及热尘埃的可能存在，需要额外成分才能匹配这些观测特征。我们的主要结果表明，部分LRDs可被建模为准恒星，并凸显了不同LRD模型之间存在显著的简并性。这对我们理解早期宇宙黑洞增长机制具有重要影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：部分LRD可以被建模为准恒星，但不同模型间存在简并性，这对理解早期宇宙黑洞增长机制有重要影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sketch representing the main model given in input to Cloudy . Our quasi-star model is inspired by Begelman et al. ( 2008 ) and includes a source of energy surrounded by a convective shell and by a dense layer of gas. The quasi-star is then surrounded by a diffuse and clumpy medium, with the possible presence of a warmer corona (see Sect. 3.5.1 ). The spectrum produced by each layer is shown on the right part of the Figure. The quantities reported are those obtained by fitting the model to the sample of LRDs from de Graaff et al. ( 2025b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：表示输入到Cloudy中的主要模型的示意图。我们的准恒星模型受Begelman等人（2008）启发，包括一个被对流壳层和致密气体层包围的能量源。准恒星随后被一个弥散且团块的介质包围，并可能存在较暖的日冕（见第3.5.1节）。每层产生的光谱显示在图的右侧。所列参数是通过将模型拟合至de Graaff等人（2025b）的LRD样本得到的。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Main parameters given in input to Cloudy
figures.caption_zh: 表1：输入到Cloudy中的主要参数

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Some examples of the quasi-star model applied to LRDs in the sample by de Graaff et al. ( 2025b ) . The black solid line shows the NIRSpec/PRISM spectrum, while the magenta solid line shows the best-fitting composite model. Its two components are shown as violet dashed line (quasi-star) and pink dotted line (host galaxy). The shaded areas indicate the non-hydrogen emission lines that are masked in the fit: metals are indicated in grey, the HeI lines in light blue, and the HeII in darker blue. The full sample of modeled LRDs can be found in the Appendix.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：准恒星模型应用于de Graaff等人（2025b）样本中LRDs的一些示例。黑色实线显示NIRSpec/PRISM光谱，品红色实线显示最佳拟合复合模型。其两个分量分别显示为紫色虚线（准恒星）和粉色点线（宿主星系）。阴影区域表示在拟合中被屏蔽的非氢发射线：灰色表示金属线，浅蓝色表示HeI线，深蓝色表示HeII线。建模的LRD完整样本见附录。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The empirical correlation between strength of the Balmer break and the Balmer decrement ( \(F_{H_{\alpha}}/F_{H_{\beta}}\) ) observed by previous studies (e.g., de Graaff et al. 2025b ; Matthee et al. 2026 ) and its possible explanation in the quasi-star scenario as an effect of the increasing hydrogen column density. The values on the two axes are taken from the catalogue by de Graaff et al. ( 2025b ) , while the values of \(N_{H}\) (colour axis) are computed from the best-fitting Cloudy models obtained in Section 3.2 . The reference values for the Balmer decrement in case A and B recombination are reported as vertical solid and dashed black lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：先前研究（例如，de Graaff等人2025b；Matthee等人2026）观测到的巴尔默跳变强度与巴尔默减缩（\(F_{H_{\alpha}}/F_{H_{\beta}}\)）之间的经验相关性，以及其在准恒星情景下作为氢柱密度增加效应的可能解释。两轴上的数值取自de Graaff等人（2025b）的星表，而\(N_{H}\)（颜色轴）的值则根据第3.2节获得的最佳拟合Cloudy模型计算得出。情况A和B复合下的巴尔默减缩参考值分别以垂直实线和虚线黑色线标出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: An example of LRD fitted by our Cloudy model where the quasi-star shows a non-negligible contribution to the blue-optical spectrum bluer than the Balmer break. The LRD is ID-4820 taken from GO-2198 (PI: L. Barrufet), the colour-coding is the same as in Figure 2 , while the lower panel shows the fractional contribution of the host galaxy and of the quasi-star to the total flux of the LRD (in pink and violet, respectively). We report, for reference, the redshifted wavelength of the Balmer break (vertical dashed line) and the 50% level (horizontal solid line).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：由我们的Cloudy模型拟合的LRD示例，其中准恒星对蓝于巴尔默跳变的蓝光光谱有不可忽略的贡献。该LRD是取自GO-2198（PI: L. Barrufet）的ID-4820，颜色编码与图2相同，下面板显示了宿主星系和准恒星对LRD总流量的分数贡献（分别以粉色和紫色表示）。我们标出了巴尔默跳变的红移波长（垂直虚线）和50%水平线（水平实线）以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Best-fitting parameters of the quasi-star model applied to the sample by de Graaff et al. ( 2025b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：准恒星模型应用于de Graaff等人（2025b）样本的最佳拟合参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the black hole masses and the stellar masses of the host galaxies for the LRDs analysed in Section 3 . The black hole masses are estimated from the bolometric luminosities of the quasi-star by assuming a ratio \(M_{BH}/M_{QS}\) (Coughlin and Begelman 2024 ) . Two extreme values of \(M_{BH}/M_{QS}=0.1\) (minimum for having a LRD-like spectrum) and \(M_{BH}/M_{QS}=0.62\) (maximum to have a stable quasi-star) are reported in the two panels. The stellar masses are derived as the normalisation factor of the SSPs employed in the fitting (Section 2.3 ). The solid magenta line and the shaded area report, respectively, the local relation by Reines and Volonteri ( 2015 ) and its intrinsic scatter.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：第3节分析的LRDs的黑洞质量与宿主星系恒星质量的比较。黑洞质量通过假设比值\(M_{BH}/M_{QS}\)（Coughlin and Begelman 2024）从准恒星的热光度估算得出。两个面板分别报告了\(M_{BH}/M_{QS}=0.1\)（产生LRD-like光谱的最小值）和\(M_{BH}/M_{QS}=0.62\)（维持稳定准恒星的最大值）两个极端值。恒星质量作为拟合中使用的SSPs的归一化因子得出（第2.3节）。品红色实线和阴影区域分别报告了Reines and Volonteri（2015）的局部关系及其固有弥散。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Extended best-fitting model of the LRD ” the Cliff ” (de Graaff et al. 2025c ) and two other LRDs from our sample (MOM-292585 and ID-4490 from GO-2198; PI. L. Barrufet) also including MIRI photometry (that was not included in the fitting procedure). For reference, we also report the modified BB modelling by de Graaff et al. ( 2025b ) as solid blue line. For ” the Cliff ”, we also report an inset with a zoom of the extended spectrum at \(\lambda>1\ \mu{m}\) to better show the comparison with MIRI points at longer wavelengths.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：LRD“the Cliff”（de Graaff等人2025c）以及我们样本中另外两个LRD（MOM-292585和ID-4490，来自GO-2198；PI. L. Barrufet）的扩展最佳拟合模型，其中还包括MIRI测光数据（未包含在拟合过程中）。作为参考，我们还以蓝色实线标出了de Graaff等人（2025b）的修正黑体建模。对于“the Cliff”，我们还附上一个插图，显示在\(\lambda>1\ \mu{m}\)处扩展光谱的放大图，以更好地展示与更长波长处MIRI点的比较。
